statics.description: Elemental permanent spells you cast from your hand have evoke {4}. (If you cast a spell for its evoke cost, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

triggers.description: Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken Elemental, create a token that's a copy of it. The token gains haste until end of turn. At the beginning of your next end step, sacrifice it unless you pay {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}.
